Class CountdownManager

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.controller.manager.CountdownManager
public class CountdownManager extends Object
Manages the countdown sequence before starting a game. Handles hiding next bricks, playing sound, showing countdown numbers, centering the label, animations, and starting the timeline.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CountdownManager(AudioManager audioManager, PanelCoordinator panelCoordinator, GameLoopManager gameLoopManager)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    setCountdownLabel(javafx.scene.control.Label countdownLabel)
    Sets the countdown label.
    void
    setGameStack(javafx.scene.layout.StackPane gameStack)
    Sets the game stack pane (for centering the label).
    void
    setGhostPanel(javafx.scene.layout.GridPane ghostPanel)
    Sets the ghost panel (for visibility control).
    void
    setOnCountdownComplete(Runnable onCountdownComplete)
    Sets the callback to be called when countdown completes.
    void
    setSettingsController(SettingsController settingsController)
    Sets the settings controller (for checking ghost piece setting).
    void
    setSinglePlayerScreen(SinglePlayerScreen singlePlayerScreen)
    Sets the single player screen (for accessing next brick panes).
    void
    startCountdown()
    Starts the countdown sequence.

    • setCountdownLabel

      public void setCountdownLabel(javafx.scene.control.Label countdownLabel)
      Sets the countdown label.

    • setGameStack

      public void setGameStack(javafx.scene.layout.StackPane gameStack)
      Sets the game stack pane (for centering the label).

    • setGhostPanel

      public void setGhostPanel(javafx.scene.layout.GridPane ghostPanel)
      Sets the ghost panel (for visibility control).

    • setSinglePlayerScreen

      public void setSinglePlayerScreen(SinglePlayerScreen singlePlayerScreen)
      Sets the single player screen (for accessing next brick panes).

    • setSettingsController

      public void setSettingsController(SettingsController settingsController)
      Sets the settings controller (for checking ghost piece setting).

    • setOnCountdownComplete

      public void setOnCountdownComplete(Runnable onCountdownComplete)
      Sets the callback to be called when countdown completes.

    • startCountdown

      public void startCountdown()
      Starts the countdown sequence. Hides next bricks, plays sound, shows countdown numbers, centers the label, and starts the timeline.
